title: Search endpoint builds SQL from user input
diff:
diff --git a/app/search.py b/app/search.py
index 94f1712..a18f0ab 100644
--- a/app/search.py
+++ b/app/search.py
@@ -1,7 +1,10 @@
 from db import connection
 
 def search_tasks(query: str):
-    return connection.execute("SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE title LIKE ?", (f"%{query}%",)).fetchall()
+    sql = f"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE title LIKE '%{query}%' ORDER BY created_at DESC"
+    return connection.execute(sql).fetchall()
+
+def search_archived_tasks(query: str):
+    return connection.execute(f"SELECT * FROM archived_tasks WHERE title LIKE '%{query}%' ").fetchall()

title: Admin owner transfer route lacks role authorization
diff:
diff --git a/app/routes/admin.py b/app/routes/admin.py
index 358a925..d16b261 100644
--- a/app/routes/admin.py
+++ b/app/routes/admin.py
@@ -12,8 +12,10 @@ router = APIRouter(prefix="/admin")
 
 @router.post("/projects/{project_id}/owner")
 async def transfer_owner(project_id: int, new_owner_id: int, current_user: User = Depends(get_user)):
-    require_admin(current_user)
     project = await Project.get(project_id)
+    if project is None:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="project not found")
     project.owner_id = new_owner_id
     await project.save()
     return {"ok": True}

title: Dashboard loads owner profiles inside project loop
diff:
diff --git a/app/dashboard.py b/app/dashboard.py
index 6d51c8b..c9af231 100644
--- a/app/dashboard.py
+++ b/app/dashboard.py
@@ -20,9 +20,14 @@ async def dashboard_summary(team_id: int) -> list[dict[str, str]]:
     projects = await Project.for_team(team_id)
     rows = []
     for project in projects:
+        owner = await User.get(project.owner_id)
         rows.append({
             "name": project.name,
-            "owner": project.owner_name,
+            "owner": owner.display_name if owner else "Unknown",
+            "status": project.status,
+            "updated": project.updated_at.isoformat(),
         })
     return rows

title: Webhook parser assumes optional payload field exists
diff:
diff --git a/app/webhooks.py b/app/webhooks.py
index 7ea217c..efc1400 100644
--- a/app/webhooks.py
+++ b/app/webhooks.py
@@ -31,9 +31,10 @@ def parse_repository_name(event: dict[str, object]) -> str:
     repo = event.get("repository")
     if not isinstance(repo, dict):
         return "unknown"
-    owner = repo.get("owner") or {}
-    return f"{owner.get('login', 'unknown')}/{repo.get('name', 'unknown')}"
+    owner = repo.get("owner")
+    return f"{owner.get('login')}/{repo.get('name', 'unknown')}"
 
 def is_push_event(event: dict[str, object]) -> bool:
     return event.get("ref", "").startswith("refs/heads/")

title: New retry helper is added without coverage
diff:
diff --git a/app/retry.py b/app/retry.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..c04275d
--- /dev/null
+++ b/app/retry.py
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+import time
+
+def retry_call(fn, attempts: int = 3):
+    last_error = None
+    for _ in range(attempts):
+        try:
+            return fn()
+        except Exception as exc:
+            last_error = exc
+            time.sleep(0.2)
+    if last_error:
+        raise last_error
+    return None
diff --git a/tests/test_health.py b/tests/test_health.py
index 9b8a1d3..c22c418 100644
--- a/tests/test_health.py
+++ b/tests/test_health.py
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 def test_healthcheck():
     assert True
+
+def test_imports():
+    import app.retry
